body_excerpt: {"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9795", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:H/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-266"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-266", "name": "Incorrect Privilege Assignment"}], "description": "### Description\r\nA flaw was found in Keycloak's Fine-Grained Admin Permissions (FGAPv2) feature. An administrator with limited client management permissions can exploit this vulnerability to assign any realm role, including highly privileged roles, to a client's scope mapping. This bypasses intended security controls, allowing the injected role to be projected into a user's authentication token when they access the modified client. This could lead to unauthorized privilege escalation within the Keycloak realm.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "html_url": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/security/advisories/GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9795"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T22:51:21Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/546680?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/pskopek", "id": 546680, "login": "pskopek", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU0NjY4MA==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Privilege escalation via improper scope mapping enforcement", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T22:51:21Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/keycloak/keycloak/security-advisories/GHSA-32h4-44jj-c5vx", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "", "name": ""}, "patched_versions": "26.6.4", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
